examples: It's a sign of the encroachment of commercialism in medicine.
Koons has engrossed himself in a world of commercialism that most modern artists disdain.
Some fans may dislike the new commercialism.
The fans don't like crass commercialism, Angelos believes, so the ballpark isn't for sale.
Behind the cynicism and the commercialism, however, the Games really do have the power to inspire.
